notes: VIX calm at 16.6 with the Dow near a record, but chips keep dragging Nasdaq lower and the June jobs report drops early tomorrow in this holiday-shortened week; cash at $32 leaves no room to add, so I hold 0.5.
journal_entry: Wed 7/1 18:46: neutral/0.5, VIX 16.6, day P&L -$16. No material change into the close — chips (MU -11%, SNDK, AMAT) still soft and parked in avoid, GETY still cratering on the terminated Shutterstock merger. Cash $32 caps adds; braced for Thursday's early payrolls print before the July 4 weekend.
